description: Three coordinated doc cleanups: removed 26 cross-skill references from system-spec-kit's README + mcp_server/README + ARCHITECTURE; zeroed Section 1 tables across all three READMEs (spec-kit, advisor, code-graph); conformed advisor + code-graph ARCHITECTURE.md to spec-kit's canonical 8-section template at terse depth (≤220 lines each). spec-kit/ARCHITECTURE.md becomes the template anchor.
